q.en: Who are the three friends solving the library mystery?
q.zh: 解图书馆之谜的三个朋友是谁？

options.en: Bennett, Virgil, and Mr. Slovak
options.zh: 贝内特、维吉尔和斯洛伐克先生

options.en: Daniel, Yuri, and Mrs. Montoya
options.zh: 丹尼尔、尤里和蒙特亚老师

options.en: Daniel, Yuri, and Bennett
options.zh: 丹尼尔、尤里和贝内特

options.en: Daniel, Jake, and Sarah
options.zh: 丹尼尔、杰克和莎拉

explain.en: Daniel, Yuri, and Bennett are best friends who discover and solve the clues together.
explain.zh: 丹尼尔、尤里和贝内特是好朋友，他们一起发现并解开了线索。

q.en: How does Daniel first realize the pencil message is meant for him?
q.zh: 丹尼尔最初如何意识到那行铅笔留言是写给他的？

options.en: The librarian tells him
options.zh: 图书管理员告诉了他

options.en: His birthday is printed on the cover according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他的生日印在封面上（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: The first letters of the words spell his name 'DANIEL' (an acrostic)
options.zh: 那些词的首字母拼出了他的名字'DANIEL'（一种离合诗）

options.en: It is written in his own handwriting
options.zh: 那是他自己的笔迹

explain.en: Daniel notices the first letters of the message 'Do All Nations Impose Equal Laws?' spell DANIEL.
explain.zh: 丹尼尔发现留言“Do All Nations Impose Equal Laws?”的首字母拼出了DANIEL。

q.en: Daniel's birth date is January 11. How does this help solve the clue?
q.zh: 丹尼尔的生日是1月11日。这对解开线索有什么帮助？

options.en: The date 1/11 leads them to chapter four, which begins on page 111
options.zh: 日期1/11把他们引向第四章，该章始于第111页

options.en: It is the page number of the glossary
options.zh: 那是词汇表的页码

options.en: It spells the word 'pater'
options.zh: 它拼出了'pater'这个词

options.en: It matches the copyright year 1959 according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它与1959年的版权年份吻合（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Using his birth date as numerals (1/11), the boys turn to chapter four on page 111 where the next poem waits.
explain.zh: 把生日写成数字（1/11），孩子们翻到第四章第111页，下一首诗就在那里。

q.en: What does the poem's clue about 'Romance' and 'father's name' lead the boys to discover?
q.zh: 诗中关于“Romance（罗曼语）”和“父亲的名字”的线索，把孩子们引向什么发现？

options.en: That the clue writer was French
options.zh: 写线索的人是法国人

options.en: That the book is about romance novels according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book as mentioned in a later chapter
options.zh: 那本书是关于言情小说的（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）（正如后文某一章提到的）

options.en: That Daniel's father is a librarian
options.zh: 丹尼尔的父亲是图书管理员

options.en: The Latin word for father is 'pater,' which points to writer Walter Pater and his book The Renaissance
options.zh: 拉丁语中的“父亲”是'pater'，这指向作家沃尔特·佩特及其著作《文艺复兴》

explain.en: The capitalized 'Romance' refers to Romance languages; the root for father is Latin 'pater,' leading to Walter Pater's The Renaissance.
explain.zh: 大写的'Romance'指罗曼语族；'父亲'的词根是拉丁语'pater'，由此找到沃尔特·佩特的《文艺复兴》。

q.en: In the book, what is an 'acrostic'?

options.en: A secret door
options.zh: 一扇秘密的门

options.en: A type of library catalog
options.zh: 一种图书馆目录

options.en: A riddle about birthdays according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一个关于生日的谜语（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A group of words whose first letters spell out another word
options.zh: 一组词，其首字母拼出另一个词

explain.en: The glossary defines 'acrostics' as words in which certain letters, taken in order, spell out other words.
explain.zh: 词汇表将'acrostics'定义为：按一定顺序取某些字母，可拼出其他词的文字游戏。

q.en: Who actually planted the clues in the library?
q.zh: 究竟是谁在图书馆里布置了这些线索？

options.en: Daniel's grandfather (Grandpa)
options.zh: 丹尼尔的祖父（爷爷）

options.en: Mr. Slovak the custodian
options.zh: 门房斯洛伐克先生

options.en: The school founder Weston Granville
options.zh: 学校创办人韦斯顿·格兰维尔

options.en: Mrs. Montoya the librarian
options.zh: 图书管理员蒙特亚老师

explain.en: The letter in the envelope is from Daniel's grandfather, who planted the clues knowing a love of reading would solve them.
explain.zh: 信封里的信来自丹尼尔的祖父，他布置了这些线索，相信热爱阅读的孩子能解开它们。

q.en: What must the boys say to Mr. Slovak to learn the secret?
q.zh: 孩子们必须对斯洛伐克先生说什么，才能得知秘密？

options.en: 'Pater is the answer.'
options.zh: “pater就是答案。”

options.en: 'We seek the heart of Granville.'
options.zh: “We seek the heart of Granville.（我们在寻找格兰维尔的心脏。）”

options.en: 'We found the acrostic.' according to some versions of the story
options.zh: “我们找到了离合诗。”（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: 'Open the door, please.'
options.zh: “请开门。”

explain.en: Grandpa's letter instructs them to tell Mr. Slovak exactly, 'We seek the heart of Granville.'
explain.zh: 祖父的信指示他们原样告诉斯洛伐克先生：“We seek the heart of Granville.”

q.en: Why does the author include a Prologue saying 'the best things in life are hidden... unless we search them out'?
q.zh: 作者为什么要写一段序言，说“生活中最美好的事物是隐藏的……除非我们去寻找”？

options.en: To describe the school's history
options.zh: 为了描述学校的历史

options.en: To introduce the theme that mysteries reveal themselves to those who notice clues and never give up
options.zh: 为了引出主题： mysteries会向那些留意线索、永不放弃的人显现

options.en: To explain how to use a catalog
options.zh: 为了说明如何使用目录

options.en: To warn readers not to enter libraries according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 为了警告读者不要进图书馆（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The prologue sets up the book's message that paying attention and persevering uncovers life's hidden mysteries.
explain.zh: 序言奠定了全书的主旨：用心观察、坚持不懈，就能揭开生活中隐藏的谜团。

q.en: The secret reading room was added when Granville School was built. In what year, and by whom?
q.zh: 这间秘密阅览室是在格兰维尔学校建成时加建的。是哪一年，由谁建造的？

options.en: 1880, by founder Weston Granville
options.zh: 1880年，由创办人韦斯顿·格兰维尔

options.en: 1959, by Daniel's grandfather according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 1959年，由丹尼尔的祖父（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: 1880, by Walter Pater
options.zh: 1880年，由沃尔特·佩特

options.en: 2008, by the King of Bhutan
options.zh: 2008年，由不丹国王

explain.en: The welcome letter says the room was added in 1880 by the school's founder, Weston Granville.
explain.zh: 欢迎信中说，这间阅览室是1880年由学校创办人韦斯顿·格兰维尔加建的。

q.en: What is required of students to keep the secret reading room?
q.zh: 学生们要保住这间秘密阅览室，必须满足什么条件？

options.en: They must solve a new clue every year according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们必须每年解开一个新线索（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: They must tell no one, or it will be shut forever
options.zh: 他们必须对任何人守口如瓶，否则房间将永远关闭

options.en: They must become librarians
options.zh: 他们必须成为图书管理员

options.en: They must pay a monthly fee
options.zh: 他们必须每月缴费

explain.en: The letter warns that if they tell anyone, the room will be shut forever, as demanded in the school's will.
explain.zh: 信中警告，一旦说出去，房间将永远封闭——这是学校遗嘱中的要求。

prompt.en: If you discovered a secret reading room like Daniel and his friends, what three rules would you want it to have, and why?
prompt.zh: 如果你像丹尼尔和他的朋友们那样发现了一间秘密阅览室，你会希望它有什么三条规则，为什么？

en: Think about what would keep the room special and safe for readers.
Consider how the rules could encourage friendship and a love of reading.
zh: 想想什么能让这间屋子对读者而言既特别又安全。
考虑这些规则如何能促进友谊与对阅读的热爱。
